heading: Claims by nationals of foreign countries
label: 31111 Claims by nationals of foreign countries
text: A national of a foreign country may not maintain a civil action under this chapter unless it appears to the satisfaction of the court in which the action is brought that the government of that country, in similar circumstances, allows nationals of the United States to sue in its courts.
